trendUnavailable: Trend evidence is unavailable for this metric.
autonomyUnavailable: Autonomy measurement is not connected on this deployment.
invalidDetail: This detail key is not registered. Choose one of the available views above.
invalidGuard: This guard is not present in the current measurement projection.
notMeasuredHint: No measured value was reported for this window.
notConnectedHint: The owning projection is not connected on this deployment.
insufficientSampleHint: The current sample is too small to calculate this value.

outcomes.title: Operating outcomes
outcomes.subtitle: Measured results, baselines, trends, and the evidence behind each outcome.
outcomes.guardUnavailable: Guard evidence is not present in the current measurement projection.
outcomes.costNoticeBody: Displayed costs use published standard prices. Actual billed amounts may differ because of negotiated discounts, commitments, credits, taxes, exchange rates, and provider billing adjustments. Use these values for reference, not invoice reconciliation.
outcomes.noBaselineHint: No paired baseline evidence was reported for this window.

auto-resolution.title: Correct outcomes without human intervention
auto-resolution.description: Counts terminal outcomes with no human touchpoint and no later rollback in the measurement window.
auto-resolution.analysisUnavailable: Guard evidence is not present in the current measurement projection.
auto-resolution.breakdownUnavailable: Vertical resolution evidence is not present in the current measurement projection.

human-touchpoints.title: Operator work that remains
human-touchpoints.description: Counts decisions or input from a person. Read-only console views do not count as touchpoints.
human-touchpoints.analysisUnavailable: The current projection does not separate approvals, manual edits, and manual rollbacks.
human-touchpoints.breakdownUnavailable: The current projection does not attribute touchpoints to individual verticals.

mttr.title: Resolution latency and its tail
mttr.description: Resolution time needs mean, median, and p90 evidence so a good average cannot hide slow recoveries.
mttr.analysisUnavailable: Median, p90, unresolved, and integrity-exclusion details are not present in the current projection.
mttr.breakdownUnavailable: The current projection does not break resolution latency down by severity.

change-lead-time.title: Governed change from request to merge
change-lead-time.description: Separates the measured outcome from approval and delivery stages while keeping change guards in view.
change-lead-time.analysisUnavailable: Request validation, policy, approval wait, and merge-stage durations are not present in the current projection.
change-lead-time.breakdownUnavailable: The current projection does not separate policy-cleared and human-approved delivery paths.

cost-per-resolved-event.title: Attributable spend per resolved result
cost-per-resolved-event.description: Tracks variable spend attributed to resolved outcomes and keeps shared fixed overhead outside the claim.
cost-per-resolved-event.analysisUnavailable: Inference, compute, storage, and event-bus cost composition is not present in the current projection.
cost-per-resolved-event.breakdownUnavailable: The current projection does not separate incident, change, and optimization unit costs.

assurance.title: Control assurance
assurance.subtitle: Deterministic guard evidence that permits, blocks, or holds autonomous operation.

verticals.title: Vertical outcomes
verticals.subtitle: Operational results and unresolved risk by FDAI vertical.
verticals.unavailable: This vertical is not present in the current measurement projection.

routing.title: Trust routing
routing.subtitle: How work is distributed across deterministic, reuse, and grounded reasoning tiers.
routing.invalidIndicator: This leading indicator is not registered.
routing.indicatorT2Only: Leading indicators apply to the T2 detail view.
